expectations.text: 輸出包含「今日輸入整理」標題
expectations.evidence: Has '## 今日整理' not '## 今日輸入整理' — slightly different

expectations.text: 輸出包含「學習」或「觀察」類別
expectations.evidence: Content covers all four events with learning/observation framing

expectations.text: 四件事（交泰丸比例、心跳反應、論文、辨證習慣）都有被提及
expectations.evidence: All four events present: 交泰丸, 心悸, 針灸, 辨證

expectations.text: 最後有詢問是否有遺漏或需要補充的句子
expectations.evidence: Ends with '還有什麼想補充的嗎？'

expectations.text: 沒有直接跳到反思問題（不應出現「印象最深刻」等反思問題）
expectations.evidence: Has section '幾個值得深入想想的問題' with 3 reflection questions — jumped to reflection prematurely
